description_long: This is a single-story suburban house with a rectangular footprint, surrounded by a green lawn and featuring a driveway leading to a covered carport on one side. The house has a mix of flat and slightly sloped roof sections, with a central open courtyard or pool area visible from above. Large windows and sliding glass doors are distributed asymmetrically along the exterior walls, providing ample natural light to the interior. The main entryway is sheltered by a small overhang and is accessible via a short walkway from the driveway. The exterior walls are finished in a light, neutral color, and the property is bordered by a simple, open yard.
description: A single-story suburban house with a flat and slightly sloped roof, central courtyard or pool, large windows, and a covered carport, set on a green lawn with a driveway.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway, large windows, and the central courtyard or pool area.
description_view_1: Angled view highlighting the driveway, covered carport, and side entry, with a clear view of the roof layout.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back wall, carport roof, and the open yard area behind the house.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing additional windows, a secondary entry, and the continuation of the green lawn.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large windows and sliding glass doors
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a small overhang, single door, and a short walkway from the driveway, no prominent porch or columns.
